rulings.Case Title: LAI CHAN VS. LINH DAO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renewed Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees Pursuant To Contract
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 14, 2018, Line 6. PLAINTIFF LAI CHAN'S Renewed Motion For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees Pursuant To Contract. Hearing Required to address timeliness of this motion. Judgment in this action was entered per Plaintiff's ex-parte application on May 11, 2018.
